title: Assign Permissions to Multiple Columns Simultaneously
excerpt: I’m wanted to add permission to a number of columns on a board. However, it seems that the only option is to do this one column at a time as opposed to selecting multiple columns at once. Can you apply permissions to a g…

posts.author: jjtPMO (Jesse Thibodeaux)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m wanted to add permission to a number of columns on a board. However, it seems that the only option is to do this one column at a time as opposed to selecting multiple columns at once. Can you apply permissions to a group of columns at the same time?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! This is a great idea!

At the moment, column permissions can only be applied one at a time. However, the board permissions apply to the entire board. Have you taken a look at board permissions instead? Would they work for what you need to do?
